title: steiractinia ocanensis
intro: Steiractinia ocanensis, also known as the "Sea Lavender", is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Steiractinia ocanensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Steiractinia ocanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
